title: GCP Cloud Storage Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Google Cloud Storage object storage.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'GCP Cloud Storage'?
options: Providing reliable and scalable object storage in the cloud—such as for images and backup files

questions.question: In GCP Cloud Storage, what is a storage unit or container—such as for a project's images—commonly called?
